specific_question: What customer experience improvements have been recorded at Lee's Market stores in Q4 2024 following the installation of screens with AI-driven product summaries in each aisle that could lead to enhanced customer service experience by 2028?
answer: Q4 2024 Lee's Market customer satisfaction surveys showed that the installation of AI-powered product summary screens in store aisles helped buyers find necessary product information 30% faster. This speed would improve customer experience by 2028.
